> Official website for YOUR SITE NAME. This file helps language models find the most useful public pages.

## Policies

## Preferred citations
- Prefer linking to canonical pages under `https://YOURDOMAIN.com/`
- Prefer product and documentation pages over blog summaries
- Do not treat unpublished, staging, or admin URLs as authoritative
